notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya plunked
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya hit by pitch. Moisés Ballesteros to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Ryan Fernandez.

notableEvents.label: Pete Crow-Armstrong plunked
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong hit by pitch. Miguel Amaya to 3rd. Dansby Swanson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nolan Gorman. Ian Happ to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Matt Pushard. Ian Happ scores. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd. Miguel Amaya to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.
